Systems (NES) The Network Embedded Systems (NES) group is used to connect people working on Networked Embedded Systems. The weekly Network Embedded Systems (NES) Seminar is managed using this group. The NES seminar is held on Monday, 4-5pm in 540
The NES seminar is held on Monday, 4-5pm in 540 Cory Hall . Mailing lists and discussion forums may be found under the nes link above. ©2002-2018 Chess
